name: Sony PlayStation 2

bios.notes: PCSX2 requires a legally dumped PS2 BIOS. File names vary by region and dump method.

frontend_notes.emudeck: Common ROM folder is ps2. BIOS normally lives under Emulation/bios rather than a per-ROM folder.
frontend_notes.es-de: ES-DE supports ps2 as a system folder; verify selected alternative emulator if multiple PCSX2 entries exist.

notes: PCSX2 requires a user-dumped BIOS; do not store BIOS files, checksums, or dump metadata in project data.

confidence_notes: PCSX2 BIOS guidance is official-doc-backed; frontend parser aliases should still be verified per installation.
notes: Prefer CHD for compressed disc storage where the selected PCSX2 version supports it.
Do not store BIOS files or BIOS checksums in rom-librarian configs.
